heading: Considerations
body:
- If you have a [Backup Compliance Policy enabled](backup-compliance-policy) enabled
  with the **Keep all snapshots when removing additional
  snapshot regions** option set to **On** and you modify or
  delete a snapshot policy item, any existing snapshots are retained
  until their scheduled expiration date.

- If you [Change the region into which a cluster is deployed](scale-cluster-region) to a secondary region that you currently
  have configured for snapshot copy distribution, Atlas
  automatically updates your backup policy to distribute snapshots
  copies from your new primary region to the original primary region
  (now a secondary region) and other secondary regions configured for
  snapshot distribution.

- If you enable a [VPC/VNet peering](vpc-peering) and
  restrict certain regions for Google Cloud, you can copy snapshots to only
  those regions.

- Oplog copy distribution is enabled at the copy region level. If you
  set **Point-in-Time Restore** to **On** for a
  snapshot copy policy item, Atlas copies oplogs to that copy
  region and enables [Restore from Continuous Cloud Backup](restore-from-continuous) for all snapshot copy policies in that
  copy region.
